name: powerbi-calendar-visual
description: Advanced multi-measure custom calendar grid visual for Power BI.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const file = './node_modules/webpack/lib/logging/Logger.js'; if (fs.existsSync(file)) { fs.writeFileSync(file, fs.readFileSync(file, 'utf8').replace(/throw new Error.*No such label.*/, 'return;')); }"
